#  Edit an Invoice in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The Contract Room is a shared portal where vendors can submit change orders and invoices directly to the project team for approval throughout the duration of the project. The Invoices tab of the Contract Room is where invoices can be added, managed, and reviewed.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Vendor' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Vendor' or 'Limited' access can only edit an invoice that they added.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * Invoices must be in a Pending state in order to be edited. If an invoice was submitted by the vendor team, it can only be edited by the vendor team.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the relevant **Contract** **Room** by clicking the name of the cost item in the project's **Cost Tracker**.   
_Note:_ Cost items with a Contract Room are marked with a **ribbon** ![Icon Ribbon Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e12d2de58e5c5ac13827dbf1f96f2148/0687361a917c45c1d15c3b11b0b16fac/icon-ribbon-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  2. Click the **Invoices** tab.
  3. Click the invoice you want to edit.
  4. Click the **vertical ellipsis** ![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  5. Click **Edit**.
  6. Make any necessary updates to the Invoice Overview, Invoice Details, or Documents sections.
  7. Click **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Create a Contract Room in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/create-a-contract-room-in-portfolio-financials)
  * [View the Contract Room in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/view-the-contract-room-in-portfolio-financials)
title: Edit an Invoice in Portfolio Financials
description: How to edit an invoice that was added to the Contract Room in Portfolio Financials.
